name: Gingerbread & Applesauce
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons candied ginger root, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flours, baking soda, baking powder, salt, ground ginger, ground cloves, and cinnamon.
2. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg and molasses.
4. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients, alternating with water.
5. In a Dutch oven or heavy casserole dish coated with butter, mix together brown sugar, finely chopped candied ginger, and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon.
6. Pour the prepared batter over the applesauce mixture.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Serve immediately.
